name: Menu_Aut_Ini_Obra
wl_code:
nProcesar is int=0
IF sIdentifier="86" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 86, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 87, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 88, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 87, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 88, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="87" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 87, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="88" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 88, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 87, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado87 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 88, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado88 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 86, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado87=1 AND nEstado88=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado87=0 AND nEstado88=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado87=1 OR nEstado88=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1

END
END
